{{Infobox construct
| name = Tiberian Arelius’s Remnant
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian Arelius]]’s [[Remnant]] is a powerful entity and highly significant weapon associated with the former [[Monarch]] of [[House Arelius]]. Originating from a [[Truegold]], this [[Remnant]] is described as the most potent weapon in existence and is personally utilized by [[Reigan Shen]]. It possesses a physical form that resembles a statue composed of solid lightning, featuring glowing teeth and eyes that crackle with electrical energy. As a [[Remnant]], it functions as a spiritual manifestation that is more physically durable and retains more of its original personality and will than typical spirits. The entity maintains a level of consciousness, capable of speaking with gravity and expressing regret. While it is extremely formidable, it has been shown to be vulnerable; [[Reigan Shen]] has had to repair cracks in its structure using [[madra]], and the entity can experience tremors or physical distress similar to a disease. The [[Remnant]] is linked to [[Tiberian]]'s legacy and his ambition to eliminate the [[Dreadgods]], though it has also been subject to being controlled or held on a leash by [[Shen]].}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] feared [[Tiberian Arelius’s Remnant]] would emerge.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Tiberian Arelius]]' [[Remnant]] appeared as a man formed from dense [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] keeps [[Tiberian Arelius]]’ [[Remnant]] in a [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian Arelius]]’ [[Remnant]] is sculpted from blue-and-gold lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] observed Reigan.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Remnant looked like a man formed from madra even denser than Little Blue’s, and he stood on a floor that wasn’t “down” from Yerin’s perspective.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
